title: helianthemum occidentale
intro: Helianthemum occidentale, also known as Rocky Mountain Bee Plant, is a perennial flowering plant native to the western parts of North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is rich in flavonoids and triterpenoids, which are believed to have health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Helianthemum occidentale can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential benefits.
